dataLoadingFunction.signature: buildDocContext(attachmentIds: string[], userId: string, projectId?: string) -> { docStore, docIndex }

nodes.name: build_doc_context
nodes.codeDescription: Loads user-attached PDF/DOCX documents from Cloudflare R2, extracts plaintext via pdf-parse / jszip+XML parsing, assigns sequential doc-N labels, and constructs the per-request docStore + docIndex used by the agent.

nodes.name: build_messages
nodes.codeDescription: Constructs the LlmMessage[] array sent to the LLM: prepends SYSTEM_PROMPT, injects a doc-availability list (doc-N -> filename), and replays prior chat history from Supabase.

nodes.name: enrich_with_prior_events
nodes.codeDescription: Appends a structured summary of prior tool calls and results to the last assistant message so the agent has memory of multi-turn tool history without reloading every event.

nodes.name: chat_agent
nodes.agentInstructions: SYSTEM_PROMPT (defined in backend/src/lib/chatTools.ts) — instructs Mike to act as a legal assistant for lawyers, cite sources using <doc-N page="X"> tags, follow strict docx generation rules, respect workflow templates when read_workflow is invoked, and never fabricate citations. Approximately 1,500 chars covering citation format, tool-use discipline, refusal behavior on unsupported claims, and DOCX edit rules.
nodes.model: user-selected (default gemini-3-flash-preview; options: claude-opus-4-7, claude-sonnet-4-6, gemini-3.1-pro-preview, gemini-3-flash-preview)

nodes.name: run_tool_calls
nodes.codeDescription: Dispatches each NormalizedToolCall from the agent to its server-side implementation: read_document/find_in_document/fetch_documents read R2 + extract text; generate_docx builds a Word file via docx library; edit_document applies tracked changes via fast-xml-parser+jszip; list_documents/list_workflows/read_workflow/read_table_cells query Supabase; replicate_document copies up to 20 documents. Returns NormalizedToolResult[] back to the agent loop.

nodes.name: extract_annotations
nodes.codeDescription: Regex-parses the assistant's final text for <doc-N page="X">snippet</doc-N> citation tags and resolves each into a structured annotation pointing back to the docId in docIndex. Drives the highlighted-citation UI on the frontend.

nodes.name: load_document_text
nodes.codeDescription: For each document in the review batch: downloads the active version from Cloudflare R2, extracts plaintext (pdf-parse for PDFs, jszip+XML for DOCX), truncates to 120,000 characters to fit in the extraction model's context window.

nodes.name: extraction_agent
nodes.systemPrompt: EXTRACTION_SYSTEM: You are a precise legal analyst. Extract the requested fields from the provided document. Output strict JSON, one object per line, with the exact schema specified. Cite the page and a verbatim quote. If a field is not present, return null with confidence 0.

nodes.name: parse_cells
nodes.codeDescription: Parses each streamed JSON line into a structured cell { columnId, value, citation: {page, quote}, confidence, status }. Tolerates trailing commas and code-fence noise. Drops malformed lines and marks the cell status='error' for those columns.

nodes.name: persist_cells
nodes.codeDescription: Inserts/updates the parsed cells into Supabase tabular_cells table keyed on (reviewId, documentId, columnId). Streams progress events back to the client over SSE.

nodes.name: tabular_chat_agent
nodes.agentInstructions: Reuses SYSTEM_PROMPT from chatTools.ts but is invoked from POST /tabular-review/:reviewId/chat with the read_table_cells tool exposed so the agent can answer questions about the populated review grid (e.g., 'which contracts have a governing law of New York?'). Same 10-iteration tool-use loop, same citation discipline.
